Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Hiroaki Yutani. Author, maintainer.

  • The authors of the dependency Rust crates. Contributor.
    see inst/AUTHORS file for details

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Yutani H (2026). string2path: Rendering Font into 'data.frame'. R package version 0.2.2.9000, https://yutannihilation.github.io/string2path/.
